response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise IDE tooling, Spring, or JVM-based IDE internals — his recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep IDE or Java/Kotlin tooling contributions.
strengths: Proven experience with Java in past roles (e.g., NI LabWindows, robotic arms)
Strong track record in developer tooling, testing frameworks, and CI/CD infrastructure
Active open-source contributor with deep interest in developer experience and education
concerns: Recent work is dominated by TypeScript/Node.js; minimal recent Java/Kotlin or Spring exposure
No clear evidence of IDE internals, language server protocol, or JVM tooling development
Lacks demonstrable experience with enterprise build tools (Maven/Gradle) or application server integration
